input_context.instructions: Create macOS Accessibility CGO bindings for Terminal.app content capture. Files: internal/terminal/macos/accessibility.h, internal/terminal/macos/accessibility.m, internal/terminal/macos/accessibility_cgo.go (macOS), internal/terminal/macos/accessibility_stub.go (other platforms). See spec for details.

output_preview:
## Why L0 Failed

**Root Cause:** Knowledge gap / Technical complexity (CGO + Objective-C + macOS Accessibility APIs + Core Foundation memory management + main thread requirements)

L0 failed due to context size exceeded, as the task requires deep integration of multiple macOS-specific technologies: CGO for bridging Go/C/ObjC, AXUIElement API for UI inspection, CoreFoundation reference counting (CFRetain/CFRelease), UTF-8 string conversion with malloc/free, autorelease pools for ObjC memory, and...
